examples: Plug your tabletop lamp into a dimmer instead of the wall socket.
When the lights are dimmer, you'll start going to bed.
If you want to go to bed at 10:30 pm, you might set a timed dimmer switch at 10 pm.
The Ube dimmer replaces standard wall switches to control incandescent, LED and CFL lights.
Looks like the prospects for an energy bill this year are getting a lot dimmer.
